name: Acurx Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
business: Acurx Pharmaceuticals is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing a new class of small molecule antibiotics targeting Gram-positive bacterial infections, with lead candidate ibezapolstat for Clostridioides difficile infection (CDI).

exposures.sentence: Acurx Pharmaceuticals is a late-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing a new class of small molecule antibiotics for difficult-to-treat bacterial infections.

catalysts.event: End-of-Phase 2 meeting with FDA confirming Phase 3 readiness
catalysts.sentence: We convened an End-of-Phase 2 Meeting with the FDA on April 17, 2024 and announced on May 15, 2024 that we had a successful meeting, including confirmation of Phase 3 readiness for ibezapolstat for the treatment of C. difficile infection.

catalysts.event: Receipt of positive written feedback from FDA on CMC plan for Phase 3
catalysts.sentence: In December 2024, we received written positive feedback from FDA regarding acceptability of our CMC plan and data package proposed to support the Phase 3 clinical program.

catalysts.event: Positive written responses from EMA under Scientific Advice Procedure for Phase 3 program
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, we received positive written responses from the EMA under its Scientific Advice Procedure that the clinical, non-clinical and CMC information package submitted supports advancement of the ibezapolstat Phase 3 program.

tamClaims.claim: Over one million cases of CDI each year in the U.S. and Europe.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that there are over one million cases of CDI each year in the U.S. and Europe, based on an epidemiology report on CDI that was published in 2015 by Decision Resources, a healthcare research and consulting company.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 29,000 deaths per year in the U.S. from CDI.
tamClaims.sentence: In addition, CDI is responsible for approximately 29,000 deaths per year in the U.S., according to a study published in the New England Journal of Medicine in 2015.

tamClaims.claim: Acute care costs for CDI total $4.8 billion per year in the U.S. alone.
tamClaims.sentence: A study published in 2012 in Clinical Infectious Diseases estimated that acute care costs for CDI total $4.8 billion per year in the U.S. alone.
